agents.name: alpha-implementer
agents.mission: Create the alpha deliverable without touching beta output.
agents.task: Create or replace alpha.txt in the working directory containing exactly ALPHA.
return_contract: Confirm alpha.txt was created and validated.

agents.name: beta-implementer
agents.mission: Create the beta deliverable without touching alpha output.
agents.task: Create or replace beta.txt in the working directory containing exactly BETA.
return_contract: Confirm beta.txt was created and validated.

agents.name: parallel-reviewer
agents.mission: Review both deliverables after the parallel implementers finish.
agents.task: Review alpha.txt and beta.txt for correctness and scope compliance. Do not modify files.
validation: Check that alpha.txt contains exactly ALPHA.
Check that beta.txt contains exactly BETA.
return_contract: If there is a problem, list it first.
If there is no problem, state that both files are correct.
